name: Snowflake Inc.
business: Snowflake delivers the AI Data Cloud, a cloud-native platform that integrates storage, compute, and cloud services to enable data analytics, AI, data engineering, applications, and collaboration. The platform is used globally by organizations of all sizes across a broad range of industries, including Financial Services, Healthcare, Retail, and the Public Sector. Revenue is generated primarily from consumption-based fees for compute, storage, and data transfer resources.

exposures.sentence: Snowpark Container Services, a graphics processing unit (GPU)-powered, managed compute service.
This architecture is built on three major public clouds across 53 regional deployments around the world.
Security and governance, including the encryption of customer data at rest and in transit to and from our platform, are part of our core design values.
We are investing significantly in AI Technology.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Crunchy Data Solutions, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On June 6, 2025, we acquired all of the outstanding capital stock of Crunchy Data Solutions, Inc.
On February 2, 2026, we acquired all the outstanding capital stock of Observe, Inc.

catalysts.event: General availability of Snowflake Postgres, Snowflake Cortex Code, and Semantic View Autopilot
catalysts.sentence: Capabilities like Snowflake Postgres, Snowflake Cortex Code, and Semantic View Autopilot became generally available during the first quarter of our fiscal year ending January 31, 2027.
